## Summary

<!-- What framework improvement does this change add or fix? (contracts, engine, agents, providers, docs, wiki scaffold) -->

## Classification

- [ ] This change improves the Context Engine framework (not personal knowledge)
- [ ] This change is reusable by a stranger without my personal biography
- [ ] No personal notes, journals, highlights, or private vault paths are included

## Sanitization (all must be **No**)

| Question | No |
|----------|----|
| Does this change depend on a private document? | [ ] |
| Was any passage copied/paraphrased from personal notes? | [ ] |
| Do examples contain personal context that is not generic framework documentation? | [ ] |
| Was a private path used as an authoritative reference without rewriting? | [ ] |
| Is there information only I possess that readers cannot generalize? | [ ] |

If any answer is **Yes**, do not open this PR until rewritten.

## Paths

- [ ] Diff only touches allowed public paths: `contracts/`, `engine/`, `agents/`, `providers/`, `wiki/` (scaffold only), `docs/`, top-level institutional docs
- [ ] No forbidden paths at upstream root: `knowledge/`, `notes/`, `journals/`, `experiments/`, `obsidian/`, `vault/`
- [ ] `research/` at root, if present, is scaffold only (`README.md`, `.gitkeep`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Preserves kernel architecture and invariants
- [ ] Does not promote instance wiki content upstream
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and [GOVERNANCE.md](../GOVERNANCE.md)
